creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221942
add back xfce_shortcuts_grabber_ungrab_all call

(In reply to Victor Sudakov from comment #63)

I understand the problem you are facing, but it looks to me that your issue is more a problem with graphics drivers and Xorg itself than with XFCE. As I said it is quite possible out vty switching acts different than the linux one. It is a completely different code base.

Unluckily without testing I cannot foresee how this is going to affect you.

Could you simply test compiling a modified x11/libxfce4menu and check how it affects you? You can simply revert it after a quick test.

I'm attaching a tentative patch to the port so anyone can test and report back.
